span.p:
async with Robot() as robot:
runtime = Runtime(robot)
await runtime.run()

span.p:
Main Loop
• Safety watchdogs
• Telemetry emit
• Command parsing
• WiFi/BLE

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
FreeRTOS Control Task
Core 1, 100Hz, Pri 5
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
RT_SAFE only
• Encoder velocity
• DC motor PID
• MotionController
• SignalBus R/W
• ControlKernel
• Observer update

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Telemetry Module
Binary sections:
0x01 IMU
0x02 ULTRASONIC
0x04 ENCODER0
0x06 DC_MOTOR0
0x10 CTRL_SIGNALS
